Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Continued To Sep-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe for Rudolph Orfino. David Whitehead for Ilse Carnes.

Mr. Lowe stated that the provisions were added for the purpose of the title company knowing that the property was being transferred, for changing the titles of the bank accounts, and stated that the provisions were housekeeping points that did not alter the settlement. Mr. Whitehead concurred with Mr. Lowe. The Court instructed counsel to file an amendment to the petition to approve the settlement and stated that notice would be waived as all interested parties entered into the amendment to the settlement. Both matters were continued to September 29, 2008.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Continued To Sep-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Continued To Oct-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2008 Continued To Jul-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. STEPHEN PORTER APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

MR. PORTER REPORTED THAT THE PARTIES AGREED TO A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE AND MEDIATION. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JULY 2, 2008. MR. PORTER TO GIVE NOTICE TO PARTIES.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR 7782. Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy H. Harris.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Continued To Apr-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Loew for Rudolph Orfino (Contestant).

Mr. Loew reported that they were still pursuing discovery, that depositions were scheduled in February and March, and that mediation would take place some time in April. The Court continued the matter to April 1, 2008 for further status. Mr. Loew may appear telephonically, but other counsel is ordered to be present. Mr. Loew will prepare the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Obi.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Continued To Jan-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: David Whitehead appearing for petitioner. Jeffrey Loew appearing for contestant Rudolph Orfino. Mr. Whitehead reported that parties are willing to mediate. He requested for a continuance to discuss mediation. Matter is continued to 1/23/08 for status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Stella Obi.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Continued To Nov-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
